Terms and Conditions

Terms for using PawDerm AI.

These terms explain that PawDerm AI is educational intake support and not a veterinary medical service.

No veterinary diagnosis

PawDerm AI can organize owner-provided photos and symptoms into possible categories, but it cannot diagnose, treat, prescribe, or replace a licensed veterinarian.

User responsibility

Users are responsible for contacting a veterinarian when symptoms are serious, worsening, or unclear. Emergency signs should not wait for software output.

Prototype status

This site is a demonstration product. Login, demo, and contact forms may be visual unless connected to production services.
